sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER, data VARCHAR, blob_data BLOB);
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (2, NULL, encode('ü_string'));
SELECT id, data, ~COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT id, data FROM test_table WHERE data IS NOT NULL GROUP BY id, data HAVING LENGTH(data) > 0) AS subquery_group HAVING ~COUNT(*) > 0;
SELECT id, ~SUM(COALESCE(LENGTH(data), 0)) AS neg_length FROM test_table GROUP BY id HAVING neg_length < 0;
SELECT id, encode(data) AS encoded_data FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE data NOT LIKE '%string%') AND data IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, ~1 AS neg_one FROM test_table WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE data IS NULL) ORDER BY neg_one;
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT data, ~LENGTH(data) AS neg_length FROM test_table WHERE data IS NOT NULL;
SELECT temp_table.data, temp_table.neg_length FROM temp_table JOIN test_table ON temp_table.neg_length = ~LENGTH(test_table.data) WHERE temp_table.neg_length < 0;
